note_text: Wound note - Leftlowerleg. Meas 2.5x4.5x0.2cm. Heavy serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 65% gran, 35% slough. Periwound intact. NPWT canister changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Kim notified.
